name: @speedora/speaker-scoring
description: Stateless module (JSON-in/JSON-out): Speaker Intelligence roadmap Milestone C - Speaker Confidence/Engagement/Importance scoring and per-turn Speaker Highlight Moments. All derived by re-running @speedora/facial-intelligence's deriveFaceLandmarkFeatures per face track and @speedora/audio-intelligence's deriveAudioFeatures per diarized speaker's own transcript segments - no new subprocess, no DB/queue access. Deliberately does NOT depend on @speedora/fusion-engine (that package is expected to depend on this one in Milestone D, not the reverse). See docs/ai/speaker-intelligence.md.
